productDisplayName: Lotto Men Rebel Black Grey Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Rebel floaters from lotto. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and ankles for comfort and protection Forefoot and ankle straps joined by a vertical synthetic strap to lock the foot in place Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for tightening Midsole Grooved footbed for all-day massage TPR footbed for perfect wear during monsoons Outsole Multi-directional patterns on the outsole for great grip Flex grooves along the central length of the outsole for flexible movement of the feet shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
